changelog: Security audit fixes: cleared live credentials from supabase-secrets.js in zip; migrated Gemini backup key slots 2&3 to SecureStorage; notice-board type field whitelist sanitization; exam.html added missing i18n.js and loading-state.js; certificates.js uses SUPABASE_CONFIG.client getter; app.js logout guards SyncEngine with typeof check; salary.js data-salary explicit String() cast.
